title: Messenger of Iscandar
overview: In the year 2199, alien beings attack the last of Earth’s space fleet who are protecting a secret mission. Ace pilot Susumu Kodai retrieves an item on Mars that could save the human race, but learns tragic news about his brother.

title: Toward a Sea of Stars
overview: Mankind finally completes its first interstellar spaceship, the Yamato, which will be sent with a crew to a distant planet. But enemies won’t let them leave Earth so easily.

title: Escape from the Jupiter Sphere
overview: After their space warp goes awry, the Yamato lands on a floating continent to make repairs. When they discover where the land comes from, the Gamilas attack.

title: Gravestone on a Frozen Field
overview: Stopping on Saturn’s moon, Susumu investigates a distress call. But a crashed ship isn’t the only thing he finds.

title: The Trap on All Sides
overview: When the Yamato attacks a Gamilan  base on Pluto, the crew realizes that they’ll have to take more drastic measures to outsmart their enemies.

title: The Sun Sets on Pluto
overview: After the recon pilots locate the main Gamilan base, the Yamato has an opportunity to counterattack.

title: Farewell to the Solar System
overview: As the Yamato prepares to leave the solar system, the crew is given a last chance to say goodbye to their loved ones on Earth.

title: Wish Upon a Star
overview: With Gamilan forces hot on their trail, the Yamato must navigate around the burning solar flares of a star.

title: Clockwork Prisoner
overview: The crew reassembles a Gamilan android found on Saturn’s moon, and the Yamato’s own robot befriends it.

title: Graveyard of the Universe
overview: When the Yamato and a Gamilan ship are trapped in a dimensional rift, their only chance of escape lies in a ceasefire.

title: A World I Once Saw
overview: Trapped on the Yamato, a Gamilan pilot reveals the truth behind the first contact with earthlings.

title: What Lies Beyond
overview: An extra-dimensional vessel attacks the Yamato as it approaches the edge of the Milky Way.

title: The Wolf from Another Dimension
overview: Having found shelter in a cluster of asteroids, the crew makes an important discovery about the Gamilas’ tactics.

title: The Whisper of the Witch
overview: Kodai and Yuki return to a seemingly empty Yamato. Attempts to locate the crew are hindered by a foe who can control memories.

title: Point of No Return
overview: Unbeknownst to General Domel, plots are unfolding on his homeworld. Meanwhile, he plans an ambush of epic proportions against the Yamato.

title: A Choice for the Future
overview: Resupply and damage control turns into mutiny when a planet is discovered that’s seemingly a valid alternative to Earth.

title: Out of the Forest of Memory
overview: An ancient warp gate presents an opportunity to get the Yamato back on schedule. Sanada reveals a secret regarding the Yamato’s automatic navigation system.

title: Over the Black Light
overview: Using the warp gate, the Yamato must bypass the planet Balun. But they’ll have to punch through a massive Gamilan fleet if they want to arrive at the Large Magellanic Cloud in one piece.

title: They're Coming!
overview: Attempting to get ahead of the enemy, Okita commands the Yamato through a dangerous section of nebula. But newly reinstated General Domel is hot on their trail.

title: Under a Rainbow Sun
overview: The Gamilans set their ambush into motion. The two commanders, Domel and Okita, vie for ultimate victory and survival.

title: Prison Planet 17
overview: Yuki is taken to the Gamilan prison planet of Leptapoda. Kodai is sent to the same planet to scout out supplies for the Yamato.

title: The Planet That We Head For
overview: After discovering that Iscandar and Gamilas are twin planets, the crew of the Yamato prepare to warp into enemy territory.

title: One Man's War
overview: With a Wave Motion Gun in Gamilan possession, the Yamato’s only option is to take the fight to Gamilas’ capital. Meanwhile, Kodai is given permission to rescue Yuki.

title: The Distant Promised Land
overview: With Desler defeated, the Yamato lands on Iscandar in hopes that Queen Starsha will grant them the Cosmo Reverser. Kodai finally uncovers the fate of his brother.

title: The Forever War
overview: En route back to Earth, the crew of the Yamato have a final confrontation with Desler.

title: Memories of the Blue Planet
overview: Celebrations are in order as the Yamato draws closer to Earth. But with Yuki in critical condition, only a miracle can ensure a happy return home.

title: AD 2202: Revive, Space Battleship Yamato
overview: It’s been three years since Earth’s revitalization. With Gamilan assistance, Captain Susumu Kodai participates in an operation to retake a floating continent base that’s been seized by a mysterious enemy.

title: Tension: Reach the Embassy on the Moon
overview: Humanity is walking a questionable path. With the former crew of the Yamato having experienced phantasmal visions, Kodai takes it upon himself to investigate the phenomenon further.

title: Shock: Legacy of the Cosmo Reverse
overview: Kodai meets with a Gamilan ambassador who informs him about Goddess Teresa. If they want to respond to her ethereal call, Kodai and the rest of Yamato’s crew will have to take an enormous risk.

title: Departure to the Unknown!
overview: Preparations to launch the Yamato are a go, but the crew faces some heavy resistance.

title: Clash! Yamato vs. Andromeda
overview: Word gets out regarding Yamato’s launch, so Andromeda intercepts. An intense confrontation ignites between battleships that will put the audacity of both captains to the test.

title: Battle to the Death: The 11th Planet Rescue
overview: The 11th planet has suffered tremendously at the hands of the Gatlantis fleet. As the closest potential responder, Yamato warps in to help.

title: The Beam of Light Flashes! / Radiance of the Wave Motion Gun
overview: The Yamato is met by a massive enemy fleet and must decide whether or not to use their last resort—the Wave Motion Gun.

title: The Trap at Planet Stravase!
overview: Offloading the 11th planet refugees has become Yamato’s top priority. Meanwhile, Kodai meets with some unexpected guests.

title: Zworder, The Devil's Alternative
overview: Kodai and the Yamato are forced to make a nearly impossible decision.

title: Bewitching: The Space Fireflies Beckon a Crisis
overview: The continued search for the planet Terezart leads the Yamato through a strange spatial phenomenon.

title: Desler's Challenge!
overview: An adversary from Kodai’s past forces the Yamato into a dangerous game of cat and mouse.

title: The Shocking White Comet Empire: The Yamato Rams Through!
overview: The crew of the Yamato are in dire straits when a supposed onboard spy compromises their location.

title: The Terezart Landing Operation: Crush the Enemy Missile Fleet!
overview: The crew’s hard-fought journey to reach Telezart comes to a head. With heavy enemy presence in the area, Yamato is driven into a corner, and available options are dwindling.

title: Zurvival's Fierce Assault: Find Teresa
overview: The time has come to break the barrier surrounding Terezart, but Zurvival will fight to impede the Yamato’s progress any way that he can.

title: O Teresa, Cry for Desler!
overview: The Yamato has its purpose, and Desler’s tragic past is revealed.

title: Farewell, Teresa! Flowers for Two Deslers
overview: Keyman faces his toughest decision yet—does he side with Desler or with the Yamato?

title: Battle off the Coast of Saturn - Gather the Wave Motion Gun Fleet!
overview: The Gatlantean Fleet is pushing toward Earth, and it’s up to the Andromeda to lead the defense. Meanwhile, the Yamato has a way to upgrade its Wave Motion Gun.

title: Yamato in Crisis - The Devil's Alternative Once More
overview: The Inferno Cannon fires, but that’s the least of Andromeda’s problems.

title: Heir to the Yamato, Her Name is Ginga
overview: The Yamato plummets toward an unknown planet. Time is of the essence regarding a new strategy to defeat Zworder.

title: Gatlantis, the Cursed Children
overview: An AI construct exposes Zworder’s past. His hatred of humanity and his mission to annihilate mankind finally surfaces.

title: Escape from the Nightmare!
overview: A device that could stop the Gatlanteans, once and for all, is uncovered, and prompts a counterattack from Zworder along with the mobilization of Earth’s new AI-controlled fleet.

title: The Fated Showdown!
overview: With Ginga’s assistance, Yamato is rebuilt. But can Yamato survive when one of their own is a potential spy?

title: Warriors of Love
overview: While locked in battle with the Yamato, Zworder tests Keyman, Desler, and the Gamilan race.

title: Yamato, Attack the Comet Empire!
overview: Earth is under threat. The Yamato and its allies strike at the heart of the Comet Empire.

title: Farewell, Space Battleship Yamato
overview: Zworder made his choice—the Ark of Destruction is unleashed.

title: Earth, Yamato Is…
overview: Six months have passed. Kodai and Yuki wander aimlessly within a higher dimension.
